name: spec-to-pr
description: Evidence-driven Codex plugin for turning briefs, Figma designs, and OpenAPI contracts into verified pull requests.

interface.shortDescription: Turn specs, Figma, and APIs into verified PRs.
interface.longDescription: Spec to PR gives Codex an evidence-led workflow for intake, traceability, OpenSpec generation, implementation lanes, quality gates, visual comparison, PR reporting, and review-request publishing.
defaultPrompt: Use spec-to-pr to turn docs, Figma, and API contracts into a verified draft PR/MR.
Run spec-to-pr doctor and check the local MCP kernel.
Generate and publish an evidence-driven PR report for my spec-to-pr run.
